title: COMP4146 Course Outline (Summary)
text:
COMP4146 Data Analytics and Artificial Intelligence is a course focusing on practical and theoretical foundations.
Core modules include: data preprocessing, exploratory data analysis, classical machine learning, evaluation metrics,
introduction to deep learning, and an applied project component emphasizing responsible AI practices.
Assessment typically includes assignments, quizzes, and a final project.

title: Late Submission Policy
text:
Late submission policy: zero tolerance without prior approval.
If an assignment is submitted after the deadline and no prior approval is granted, the submission is not accepted.
Students should request extensions before the deadline with valid reasons and supporting evidence.

title: Academic Integrity & Minimum Implementation Requirements
text:
Academic integrity: plagiarism and unauthorized collaboration are prohibited.
You must cite sources properly and submit your own work.
Minimum implementation requirements checklist may include: reproducible environment, clear documentation,
baseline comparison, evaluation metrics, and ablation or error analysis where applicable.
